goal: Build agno MVP - a reliability bridge translating MCP tool servers into OpenAI-compatible tools interface with canonical error contract, pagination normalization, and GitHub reference adapter

tasks.title: Project scaffolding + CLI skeleton
tasks.description: Initialize Node.js/TypeScript project with package.json (name: agno), tsconfig.json, src/ structure, and CLI framework (commander) with 'bridge' and 'report' subcommands

tasks.title: HTTP server with endpoints skeleton
tasks.description: Create Express server with POST /v1/chat/completions (skeleton), GET /healthz, GET /capabilities. Server starts on port 3847 (auto-increment if busy). Print 'Bridge ready' + endpoint URL on startup

tasks.title: MCP client integration
tasks.description: Implement MCP client to connect to upstream MCP server URL (from --url flag), fetch tools list, handle connection errors with canonical error wrapping

tasks.title: Canonical error contract
tasks.description: Implement all 8 error classes (auth, permission, invalid_args, not_found, conflict, rate_limit, transient, timeout) with envelope structure including class, retryable, suggested_backoff_ms, message, action, context. Map HTTP status codes to classes per spec

tasks.title: MCP to OpenAI tools translation
tasks.description: Translate MCP tools list to OpenAI tools[] format (function schemas). Ensure stable naming and parameter shapes. Fail closed with invalid_args if representation unsafe. Inject mutation warnings for non-idempotent operations

tasks.title: Request/response flow implementation
tasks.description: Handle incoming OpenAI chat completions requests, extract tool calls, translate to MCP tool invocations, execute against upstream, translate responses back to OpenAI format. Return canonical error for stream:true requests

tasks.title: Pagination normalization
tasks.description: Implement opaque cursor pagination for list-like tools. Output shape: {data: [], pagination: {has_more: bool, cursor: string}}. Encode upstream page tokens/numbers into opaque cursor

tasks.title: Idempotency + mutation handling
tasks.description: Detect mutation operations (heuristic + known list). For mutations: require X-Idempotency-Key for safe retries, return retryable:false without key. Allow safe retries for read-only operations on rate_limit/transient

tasks.title: Auth handling
tasks.description: Implement bridge-level credential reading from env (GITHUB_TOKEN etc). Optional --allow-auth-passthrough flag for per-request auth. Whitelist only Authorization header for passthrough. Never log auth values

tasks.title: Logging with redaction
tasks.description: Implement stdout logging with default redaction of tokens, cookies, authorization headers. No request/response bodies logged unless --trace. No disk persistence

tasks.title: Trace mode
tasks.description: Implement --trace flag for side-by-side sanitized view: OpenAI request vs translated MCP request, OpenAI response vs MCP response. Truncate large values, always redact secrets

tasks.title: CLI startup output polish
tasks.description: On bridge start: print capabilities block (streaming unsupported, pagination cursor, errors canonical, auth mode), copy/paste snippets (JS + Python), insight tease after first request

tasks.title: Conformance report command
tasks.description: Implement 'agno report' command. Default: markdown block with capability matrix, conformance score (0-100), last verified timestamp, badge snippet. --format json for CI. Score based on schema validity, error wrapping, pagination, auth, determinism

tasks.title: GitHub adapter integration test
tasks.description: End-to-end test with GitHub MCP server: list repos (pagination), create issue (mutation), update issue (mutation), intentional failures (bad args, bad auth) showing canonical errors. Verify all acceptance criteria
